distillations.paper_title: Local Motion Phases for Learning Multi-Contact Character Movements
distillations.authors: Sebastian Starke, Yiwei Zhao, Taku Komura, Kazi Zaman
distillations.concept: Local phases: per-bone independent phase channels that break the single-global-cycle assumption. Non-cyclic motions get 0→1 activation spikes instead of forced cyclic wrapping.

distillations.paper_title: DeepPhase: Periodic Autoencoders for Learning Motion Phase Manifolds
distillations.authors: Sebastian Starke, Ian Mason, Taku Komura
distillations.concept: Multi-dimensional phase manifold via Periodic Autoencoder. Phase as latent vector with amplitude/frequency/offset channels. Cyclic motions become sustained oscillations while transient motions become one-shot activation spikes.

distillations.paper_title: Generalized Phase State — Unified Cyclic/Transient Phase Architecture
distillations.concept: PhaseState dataclass with an is_cyclic gate so cyclic motion uses trig interpolation and transient motion uses direct scalar interpolation without adapter bypasses.

distillations.paper_title: DeepMimic: Example-Guided Deep Reinforcement Learning of Physics-Based Character Skills
distillations.authors: Xue Bin Peng, Pieter Abbeel, Sergey Levine, Michiel van de Panne
distillations.concept: Translate physical plausibility into a scalar reward-style objective so foot skating, discontinuity, and instability can be optimized by repeated simulation rather than manual tuning.

distillations.paper_title: Eureka: Human-Level Reward Design via Coding Large Language Models
distillations.authors: Yecheng Jason Ma, Maxence Richard, Linxi Fan, et al.
distillations.concept: Upgrade Layer 3 from a passive evaluator to an active coach that iteratively proposes parameters, scores them, and writes back the winning configuration into the repository state.

distillations.paper_title: Optuna: A Next-Generation Hyperparameter Optimization Framework
distillations.authors: Takuya Akiba, Shotaro Sano, Toshihiko Yanase, Takeru Ohta, Masanori Koyama
distillations.concept: Use define-by-run black-box optimization to search transition strategy, blend window, and runtime query weights under a deterministic seed and bounded trial budget.

distillations.paper_title: Advanced Character Physics
distillations.concept: Use velocity-less Verlet integration and repeated distance-constraint relaxation to build lightweight articulated secondary motion that is stable enough for real-time characters without a heavy full-body solver.

distillations.paper_title: Jakobsen Secondary Chain Evolution Bridge — Three-Layer Lightweight Rigid-Soft Loop
distillations.concept: Track constraint error, tip lag, and stretch ratio for kinematic secondary chains; distill successful recipes back into knowledge and persist trend data for future auto-tuning.

distillations.paper_title: Motion Matching and The Road to Next-Gen Animation
distillations.concept: Trajectory prediction as spring-damper; obstacle reaction before contact; entity clamped to simulated point. Adopted: predict terrain contact via SDF query before it happens.

distillations.paper_title: Distance Matching in Unreal Engine (Paragon)
distillations.concept: Distance-curve-driven playback: advance fall animation to frame whose Distance Curve matches D. Adopted: bind transient phase to SDF distance so phase=1.0 at contact.

distillations.paper_title: Environment-aware Motion Matching
distillations.concept: Environment features (2D ellipse body proxies) integrated into Motion Matching cost function. Adopted: terrain surface normal influences pose via slope compensation.

distillations.paper_title: Falling and Landing Motion Control for Character Animation
distillations.authors: Ha, S., Ye, Y., Liu, C.K.
distillations.concept: Airborne + landing phase decomposition; moment of inertia optimization; impact distribution. Adopted: TTC-driven two-phase structure (stretch + brace/landing).

distillations.paper_title: Terrain Sensor Evolution Bridge — Three-Layer SDF Terrain + TTC Loop
distillations.concept: SDF terrain query at foot position → sphere-traced distance → gravity-corrected TTC → phase binding → brace/landing signals → slope compensation. Three-layer bridge: evaluate accuracy, distill rules, compute fitness bonus.

distillations.paper_title: Normals for an SDF
distillations.concept: Treat the normalized SDF gradient as the canonical surface orientation source, then reuse it for offline sprite-space normal-map baking without raymarching.

distillations.paper_title: 2D Distance and Gradient Functions
distillations.concept: Design the renderer around a distance-plus-gradient contract so existing SDF callables can use finite-difference fallback today while future primitives can plug in exact analytic gradients.

distillations.paper_title: 2D Lighting Engine Compatibility for Analytical SDF Aux Maps
distillations.concept: Export RGB normal maps and grayscale depth proxies alongside the albedo sprite so mainstream 2D engines can consume procedural characters through forward or deferred lighting workflows.

distillations.paper_title: Stable Fluids
distillations.concept: Unconditionally stable fluid solver using semi-Lagrangian advection and implicit viscosity, enabling real-time 2D smoke with controllable force injection.

distillations.paper_title: Real-Time Fluid Dynamics for Games
distillations.concept: Compact game-ready formulation of dens_step, vel_step, project, and boundary handling suitable for a NumPy implementation with ghost cells and internal obstacles.

distillations.paper_title: Stable Fluids VFX Evolution Bridge — Three-Layer Smoke Iteration Loop
distillations.concept: Connect flow energy, obstacle leakage, and fluid-guided particles into a repository-native three-layer cycle: evaluate, distill rules, and write best practices back into project memory.

distillations.paper_title: Stylizing Video by Example
distillations.authors: Ondřej Jamriška, Šárka Sochorová, Ondřej Texler, Michal Lukáč, Jakub Fišer, Jingwan Lu, Eli Shechtman, Daniel Sýkora
distillations.concept: Patch-based synthesis with temporal blending guided by optical flow. Keyframe styles are propagated to intermediate frames using NNF (Nearest Neighbor Field) matching constrained by motion vectors, achieving temporally coherent video stylization.

distillations.paper_title: OnlyFlow: Optical Flow based Motion Conditioning for Video Diffusion Models
distillations.authors: Mathis Koroglu, Hugo Music, Guillaume Couairon, Nicu Sebe, Yuki M. Asano
distillations.concept: Trainable optical flow encoder injects flow features into temporal attention layers of video diffusion models, enabling explicit motion control without retraining the base model. Ground-truth flow from procedural animation eliminates estimation noise.

distillations.paper_title: MotionPrompt: Optical Flow Guided Prompt Optimization for Coherent Video Generation
distillations.authors: Daeun Nam, Gyeongho Bae, Jong Chul Ye
distillations.concept: Optical flow as a differentiable loss signal for prompt optimization in video generation. Flow-guided prompt tuning achieves temporal consistency without architectural changes to the diffusion model.

distillations.paper_title: Ground-Truth Motion Vectors from Procedural FK for Zero-Flicker Temporal Consistency
distillations.concept: Leverage the procedural math engine's exact FK knowledge to export perfect ground-truth motion vectors with zero estimation error. SDF-weighted skinning blends per-joint displacements into per-pixel flow fields, enabling EbSynth and ControlNet conditioning without noisy optical flow estimation.

distillations.paper_title: Neural Rendering Evolution Bridge — Three-Layer Temporal Consistency Loop
distillations.concept: Three-layer evolution bridge for temporal consistency: Layer 1 gates animation acceptance on warp error, Layer 2 distills flicker patterns into knowledge rules, Layer 3 integrates temporal fitness into the physics evolution loop with skinning sigma optimization.

summary: Evolution Cycle CYCLE-20260417_030217 (SESSION-042); 1155 internal proposals found; 24/24 distillations validated; 1000 tests tracked; active Layer 3 closed loop holds 1 distilled transition rule(s); analytical SDF rendering exports 3 tracked auxiliary hooks; fluid VFX bridge tracks 4 Stable Fluids hook(s); Jakobsen bridge tracks 4 lightweight secondary-chain hook(s); terrain sensor bridge tracks 7 SDF terrain + TTC hook(s); neural rendering bridge exports 6 tracked MV hooks.
